instruction: Create an iOS26 SwiftUI view using the new LockScreenWeatherWidget API to show current weather.
Show how to use the new iPadOS26 MultiAppDrag API to drag images between two apps.
Create a macOS26 SwiftUI view using the new QuickNote API to add a note from the menu bar.
Show how to use the new WatchOS26 HeartRateZone API to display current heart rate zone.
Create a TVOS26 SwiftUI view using the new GameControllerAPI to show connected controllers.
Create a VisionOS26 SwiftUI view using the new SpatialAudio API to play a sound at a location.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of Strings to @Observable for iOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published struct containing a Double property to @Observable for macOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of Bool values to @Observable for watchOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published set of UUIDs to @Observable for tvOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published optional Int property to @Observable for visionOS26.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iOS26 that displays a favorite movie, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iPadOS26 that displays a favorite artist, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for macOS26 that displays a disk space value, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for watchOS26 that displays a hydration reminder, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for tvOS26 that displays a favorite director, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for visionOS26 that displays a virtual object count, configurable via AppIntent.
Create an iOS26 SwiftUI view using the new AppShortcuts API to add a custom shortcut for a calendar event.
Show how to use the new iPadOS26 SplitView API to create a four-column layout.
Create a macOS26 SwiftUI view using the new NotificationBanner API to show a success banner.
Show how to use the new WatchOS26 SleepTracking API to display sleep efficiency.
Create a TVOS26 SwiftUI view using the new RemoteControl API to show remote firmware version.
Create a VisionOS26 SwiftUI view using the new EyeTracking API to show gaze direction.

Create a WidgetKit widget for iOS26 that displays a favorite food, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iPadOS26 that displays a favorite place, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for macOS26 that displays a RAM usage value, configurable via AppIntent.

Create a WidgetKit widget for tvOS26 that displays a favorite genre, configurable via AppIntent.
